name: Christmas Tree Loaves: Klippta Kransar
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Pillsbury's Best All Purpose Flour, sifted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
3. SOFTEN yeast in warm water.
4. MELT butter in hot scalded milk in a large bowl.
5. COOL mixture to lukewarm.
6. STIR in sugar, eggs, salt, and cardamom (if desired) into the softened yeast.
7. GRADUALLY ADD 6 to 7 cups flour to create a stiff dough.
8. KNEAD on a floured surface for 5 to 7 minutes.
9. PLACE dough in a greased bowl and cover it.
10. LET rise in a warm place (85°F to 90°F) until light and doubled in size, about 1 1/2 hours to 2 hours.
11. PUNCH down the dough; COVER it.
12. LET rise again in a warm place for 30 minutes.
13. COMBINE sugar, chopped nuts, and cinnamon.
14. MELT butter and set aside.
15. DIVIDE dough into 3 parts.
16. ROLL out one part on a floured surface to form a triangle with a base of 15 inches, height of 10 inches, and thickness of 1/4 inch.
17. SHAPE the dough with hands and rolling pin.
18. BRUSH generously with melted butter.
19. SPRINKLE with about a third of the sugar mixture.
20. ROLL up the triangle, starting from one of the bottom corners and rolling along the base to form a triangle-shaped roll.
21. PLACE on a greased baking sheet and FLATTEN the triangle.
22. CUT deep gashes at 3/4-inch intervals down each side almost to the center.
23. STRETCH and FOLD each cut section back on its side to form "branches."
24. CUT off the bottom "branch" on each side to form the "base" of the tree.
25. COVER with plastic wrap and REPEAT with the remaining dough.
26. LET rise in a warm place until light, about 30 to 45 minutes.
27. BAKE in a moderate oven (350°F) for 20 to 25 minutes.
28. FROST with Vanilla Glaze.
29. DECORATE "branches" with red and green cherries or French's Colored Sugars and Funsten's Nuts.
